description: Style Notepuma is the global athletic brand that successfully fuses influences from sport, lifestyle and fashion. Puma's unique industry perspective delivers the unexpected in sport-lifestyle footwear, apparel and accessories, through technical innovation and revolutionary design. Product DetailsSupportive upper to non over lasted training shoeCarbon rubber middle soleMeshed tonguePerforated at topOverlays at heelRubber midsoleForm stripes at upperRubber outsole with pivots and deep groovesPuma leaping logo at side of toe cup Material and CareLeather and rubberWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
